question: FTP (File Transfer Protocol)
canonical_answer: A protocol used to transfer files across the Internet. Variants include S(ecure)FTP, FTP with SSL (FTPS and FTPES) and T(rivial)FTP. FTP utilizes ports 20 and 21.

appears_in.title: Comptia A+ Course Notes
appears_in.answer:
Encrypted communication link - tcp/22
• Looks and acts the same as Telnet

appears_in.title: Comptia A+ Notes
appears_in.answer:
Encrypted communication link - tcp/22
• Looks and acts the same as Telnet

appears_in.title: Comptia Certmaster Practice For Network+
appears_in.answer: A protocol used to transfer files across the Internet. Variants include S(ecure)FTP, FTP with SSL (FTPS and FTPES) and T(rivial)FTP. FTP utilizes ports 20 and 21.

appears_in.title: Comptia Notes
appears_in.answer:
Encrypted communication link - tcp/22

appears_in.title: Dr Messer Comptia
appears_in.answer: tcp/20 (active mode data), tcp/21 (control) - transfer files between systems with authentication, with a username and password

appears_in.title: Professor Messer Network Plus
appears_in.answer: tcp/20(active mode data), tcp21(control), transfers files between systems. authenticates with a username and password
